text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Three, two, one... Whew...
choice_data_list:
All right, let's take a break and ice your
muscles!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've been putting together training
routines for Sakura Chiyono O based on the idea
that she's already passed her peak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she doesn't have the energy of an
up-and-coming Umamusume, she can still
improve herself as an athlete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And while she can't rely on pure strength to win,
she can still work on other skills, such as her
explosive force and quick thinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll also need to learn how best to condition
herself in preparation for her races. We need to
avoid injuries at all costs.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Eep... Don't you think there's too much ice in the
bucket? M-my legs are... s-so cold...
choice_data_list:
This'll help prevent muscle fatigue, so bear with
it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we need to try anything and
everything that can help her improve.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming. Sorry for calling you here
so suddenly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Here... Take this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It contains exercises our family's chief physician
gave me. They focus on improving one's ability
without injuring any muscles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what you two are going through, but
I do understand what kind of training routine you
want.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I have weak legs myself, so I can commiserate.
However, I have since accepted my fate and am
constantly looking for ways to improve regardless
of my legs.
choice_data_list: Thank you. I'll make good use of this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome. All I ask of you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Is that you take good care of my rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The paper bag she hands me feels impressively
hefty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right away, I try and make a new routine using
the documents Mejiro Ardan gave me. When I go
to ask for Sakura Chiyono O's opinion...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O. I deeply apologize for inviting you to
Ardan's scrimmage the other day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what's going on, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I should not have tried to encourage you the way
I did then. As such, I wanted to apologize to you
and give you a piece of advice.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Advice?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. The Kongo Yaegaki style is a martial art
that focuses on protection.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But protecting something is not simply about
putting broken pieces back together. Sometimes,
you must break those pieces completely.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Just like when I was taken to train under my
master, there are times when you must abandon
the path you have trodden in order to forge a
new one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Please keep that in mind... That is all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't sound like Sakura Chiyono O revealed
her condition to her friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet they still managed to discern that
something was wrong and are doing whatever
they can to help her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I really do.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't just give up here. As their rival, I have to
give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And on the last day of summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm done being afraid. I need to accept my
weaknesses and stop trying to put broken pieces
back together...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Instead, I'll demolish them completely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O sprints down the beach to the
best of her current ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her time is 1.1 seconds better than it was last
winter.
